core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Maintenance

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Maintenance is the continuous operating discipline that keeps the sovereign graph healthy after capsules are created. It now routes that discipline through four bounded sub-hubs so topology pressure, epistemic arbitration, synthesis evolution, and runtime jobs remain explicit instead of collapsing into one 18-link parent hub.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `topology-pressure` owns link hygiene, structural refinement, decomposition pressure, markup repair, and neighborhood-shape diagnostics.
- `epistemic-arbitration` owns contradiction pressure, debate routing, and advisory handling when claims, links, or cluster boundaries remain contested.
- `synthesis-evolution` owns resonance clustering, void mapping, novel synthesis, and graph-growth pressure where strong regions should become higher-signal structure.
- `runtime-jobs` owns capsule jobs, night-shift operation, vault stewardship coupling, and background runtime support that make graph maintenance materially executable.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent graph-maintenance hub keeps only the top-level relationship to CapsuleOS, N-Infinity, Background Agent Runtime, Vault Stewardship Swarm, To Dig Deep, and the four maintenance sub-hubs. Detailed maintenance routing now flows through those sub-hubs so graph upkeep remains a legible operating contract instead of a flat registry of every worker, debate lane, and runtime hook.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Maintenance now acts as a bounded routing hub for four explicit maintenance surfaces: topology pressure, epistemic arbitration, synthesis evolution, and runtime jobs. The parent keeps only top-level ties to CapsuleOS, N-Infinity, Background Agent Runtime, Vault Stewardship Swarm, To Dig Deep, and the four sub-hubs. This makes graph upkeep easier to inspect because topology repair, contradiction handling, synthesis pressure, and executable maintenance jobs no longer hide inside one overloaded parent capsule. The result is a clearer maintenance contract for how the sovereign graph preserves trust while evolving.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Refactored Capsule Graph Maintenance into four bounded sub-hubs so topology pressure, epistemic arbitration, synthesis evolution, and runtime jobs no longer collapse into an 18-link parent hub.
